content.problemStatement:
Chef and Chefina are residing in a hotel.

There are 101010 floors in the hotel and each floor consists of 101010 rooms.


Floor 111 consists of room numbers 111 to 101010.
Floor 222 consists of room numbers 111111 to 202020.

…\ldots…
Floor iii consists of room numbers 10⋅(i−1)+110 \cdot (i-1) + 110⋅(i−1)+1 to 10⋅i10 \cdot i10⋅i.
You know that Chef's room number is XXX while Chefina's Room number is YYY.

If Chef starts from his room, find the number of floors he needs to travel to reach Chefina's room.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains of a single line of input, two integers X,YX, YX,Y, the room numbers of Chef and Chefina respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output the number of floors Chef needs to travel to reach Chefina's room.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains two integers X and Y, the room numbers of Chef and Chefina respectively.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single integer – the absolute difference between the floor numbers of the two rooms.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Room 1 is on floor 1, room 100 on floor 10 → |1-10| = 9.
Room 42 and 50 are both on floor 5 → 0.
Room 53 on floor 6, room 30 on floor 3 → |6-3| = 3.
Room 81 on floor 9, room 80 on floor 8 → |9-8| = 1.
Room 10 is on floor 1, room 11 on floor 2 → difference 1.\nRoom 27 on floor 3, room 73 on floor 8 → difference 5.

solution.approach: Each floor contains exactly 10 consecutive rooms. The floor number of a room r is ceil(r / 10), which can be computed as (r + 9) / 10 using integer division. For each test case we compute floorX = (X + 9) / 10 and floorY = (Y + 9) / 10, then output |floorX - floorY|. This runs in O(1) per test case.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) – constant work per test case.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few integer variables.

code.Python3:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys

def main():
    data = sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
    if not data:
        return
    it = iter(data)
    T = int(next(it))
    out = []
    for _ in range(T):
        X = int(next(it))
        Y = int(next(it))
        floorX = (X + 9) // 10
        floorY = (Y + 9) // 10
        out.append(str(abs(floorX - floorY)))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
